summary: BTC Tools | Team Zixi Sources | Validate UI
gherkin:
When the user clicks "BTC Tools" in the sidebar or on the Home dashboard
card
Then the user lands on the Schedule page
And the user sees the Team Zixi Sources tab on the BTC Tools page
When the user clicks on the Team Zixi Sources tab
And !xray-attachment://202a7cfd-de43-4756-8d98-f62a1ffb33e0|width=1392,height=888!
!xray-attachment://bebbe50e-ae60-4f64-b91e-c58be5e08c83|width=1297,height=645!
Then the user lands on the Team Zixi Sources page
And the user sees a search box at the top
And the user sees team cards (one card per team)
And each team card shows the following:
* Team logo
* Team ID
* "Partner Lock Orchestration" with status (e.g. Disabled)
* "Lock Zixi Sources" and "Unlock Zixi Sources" buttons
* A warning icon when the Lock/Unlock buttons are disabled
* *And* each team card shows either a table of Zixi sources or the message "No Zixi Sources found"

steps.action:
*When* the user clicks "BTC Tools" in the sidebar or on the Home dashboard
card
steps.result:
*Then* the user lands on the Schedule page

*And* the user sees the Team Zixi Sources tab on the BTC Tools page

steps.action: *When* the user clicks on the Team Zixi Sources tab
steps.result:
*Then* the user lands on the Team Zixi Sources page

*And* the user sees a search box at the top

*And* the user sees team cards (one card per team)

*And* each team card shows the following:

* Team logo
* Team ID
* "Partner Lock Orchestration" with status (e.g. Disabled)
* "Lock Zixi Sources" and "Unlock Zixi Sources" buttons
* A warning icon when the Lock/Unlock buttons are disabled
* *And* each team card shows either a table of Zixi sources or the message "No Zixi Sources found"
